_description: Naming configuration for Azure Local deployments. Customize the naming standards below to match your environment.

storageAccount.allowedCharacters: Lowercase alphanumeric only (no hyphens or uppercase)

keyVault.allowedCharacters: Alphanumeric and hyphens, must start with a letter

customLocation.allowedCharacters: Alphanumeric and hyphens, cannot start or end with a hyphen

resourceBridge.allowedCharacters: Alphanumeric and hyphens, cannot start or end with a hyphen

_placeholders.{UniqueID}: Replaced at runtime with the Unique ID entered during deployment (e.g., a store number, site code, or location identifier).
_placeholders.{NodeNumber}: Replaced at runtime with the zero-padded node number (e.g., 01, 02). Generated automatically based on deployment type and node count.
_placeholders.{TypeOfDeployment}: Replaced at runtime with the deployment type (e.g., SingleNode, MultiNode, Switchless, RackAware).

_environmentDescription: Azure environment-specific values. You MUST update these for your tenant before running deployments. You can get this value using this PowerShell command: (Get-AzADServicePrincipal -DisplayName 'Microsoft.AzureStackHCI Resource Provider').Id
